torch_pattern: y = x[:, :, start:end, :]  # e.g. chunk_input = torch_input[:, :, start_seq:end_seq, :] / tens_input[:, :ntok, :] (contract padded tokens back to logical length)

config_template.notes: Used for: last-token-tile extraction in prefill (START=(last_token_idx//32)*32, END=START+32), un-padding tile/CCL-padded last dims (ends[-1]={LOGICAL_HIDDEN}), KV-cache valid-prefix extraction (END=nearest_32(layer_past_len+1)), and seq/batch chunking loops (START=i*{CHUNK}, END=min(START+{CHUNK},{SEQ})).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: last-token tile [1,1,32,{HIDDEN}] sliced from prefill activations [1,1,{SEQ},{HIDDEN}]
placement_observations.source: llama/falcon lm_head call sites: ttnn.slice(norm_out_replicated, ..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); most prefill last-token slices use default (DRAM interleaved)
deepseek MLA decode: tt_q/tt_kv_nope/tt_kv_rope slices with memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG; padded-N matmul output trimming with memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG

placement_observations.size_descriptor: KV-cache valid prefix [batch, kv_heads, nearest_32(past_len+1), head_dim]
placement_observations.source: falcon attention: ttnn.slice(layer_past[0], ..., memory_config=model_config['K_CACHE_SLICE_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] / 'DEFAULT_MEMCFG'), followed by interleaved_to_sharded when model_config['l1_sharded']

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-head K/V slice [1,1,{KEY_LEN},{SEQ}] inside attention loop
placement_observations.source: tsa attention: k_slice/v_slice = ttnn.slice(..., memory_config=self.l1_interleaved_memory_config) feeding matmul

placement_observations.size_descriptor: bfloat8 TILE slice of padded matmul output before CCL all_reduce
placement_observations.source: gpt-oss: slice output is round-tripped via ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_out, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) as workaround for non-standard page layout under L1 fragmentation (#41640)
